creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
I thought this was done in head recently, but if this hasn't been done, then poudriere appears to be using the host system's mk files and not the jail's to determine CPU features.

root@chips.ysv:/home/sbruno # poudriere bulk -c -a -j 11aarch64

[00:00:01] ====>> Mounting system devices for 11aarch64-default
